meaning: adj.[医]引起癫痫的,致癫痫的 由癫痫引起的
examples: Objective To explore the surgical treatment of the epileptogenic glioma.
Objective To explore the value of SPECT, EEG and MRI in the localization of epileptogenic focus.
In this former sub-group of patients, a greater number of epileptogenic structures was also found.
